# Prompt Templates Shared Resources

This document lists the shared markdown snippets used across the prompt library to enforce DRY principles.

- `templates/_shared/frontmatter.md` – Standard YAML frontmatter for Hermès, Copilot, and OpenCode prompts.
- `templates/_shared/best-practices.md` – General best‑practice guidelines for prompt authoring, including naming, trigger design, and safety considerations.
- `templates/_shared/skill-refs.md` – Table of skill references to include in prompts.
- `templates/_shared/verification-checklist.md` – Common verification checklist to embed in prompts before marking them complete.
